title: Conjunctivitis
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Conjunctivitis is inflammation or infection of the membrane lining the eyelids and covering the white of the eye.
Symptoms can include redness, discharge, crusting, itching, or tearing.
Home care includes hygiene and avoiding sharing items that touch the eyes.
Contact lens use, pain, vision problems, or severe symptoms need clinician-specific evaluation.
